title: ruehssia saturejifolia
intro: Ruehssia saturejifolia, also known as Ajuga reptans, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ruehssia saturejifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its adaptogenic and nervine properties.
